function: Consolidate the week: recycle, no new grammar.
canDo: I can introduce myself, say what I want, and ask a simple question.

grammarPoint.title: Week 1 recap: no new grammar today
grammarPoint.explanation: No new grammar — today is about **speed and confidence** with what you already have. Run back through the present tense: **я/ты/мы** endings (-ю/-ешь/-ем or -ю/-ишь/-им), **хоте́ть**'s irregular pattern, and **кто/что/где/как/почему** for questions. If any of this still feels slow, that's exactly what today is for.

examples.en: Do you understand? Yes, a little.
Who is this? This is a friend.

vocab.note: хочу, хочешь, хочет, хотим, хотите, хотят

dialogues.title: A full first conversation
dialogues.note: Every word here came from this week. Read it once, then shadow it out loud.

lines.speaker: A
lines.ru: Здравствуйте! Меня зовут Анна. Как вас зовут?
lines.en: Hello! My name is Anna. What's your name?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Здравствуйте! Меня зовут Габриэль. Очень приятно.
lines.en: Hello! My name is Gabriel. Nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Nice to meet you! Do you speak Russian?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Немного. Я хочу говорить по-русски, но это трудно.
lines.en: A little. I want to speak Russian, but it's difficult.

lines.speaker: A
lines.ru: Понимаю! А что вы любите делать?
lines.en: I understand! And what do you like to do?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Я люблю читать и слушать музыку. А вы?
lines.en: I like reading and listening to music. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I like walking. Can we go together?

comprehension.q: What does Gabriel say is difficult?
Introduce yourself in one sentence: name and one thing you like doing.
Say "I want to speak Russian, but it's difficult."
comprehension.answer: Я хочу говорить по-русски, но это трудно.
acceptable: хочу говорить по-русски но это трудно

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word from this week.
Translate into Russian — mix words from the whole week.

items.q: What is your name? — My name is ...

exercises.prompt: Put the words in the right order.

translate.en: Hello! My name is ... Nice to meet you.
I want to speak Russian, but it's difficult.
translate.answer: Я хочу говорить по-русски, но это трудно.

translate.en: What do you like to do?

buildSentences.instruction: Write 5 sentences that could all appear in one real conversation: greet, give your name, say what you want or like, ask a question.

freeWrite.prompt: Write your fullest self-introduction yet: greeting, name, what you want or like doing, and one question for the other person. Aim for 4+ sentences.
freeWrite.modelAnswer: Здравствуйте! Меня зовут Габриэль. Я немного говорю по-русски, но я хочу говорить лучше. Я люблю читать и слушать музыку. А что вы любите делать?

tasks: Have one full exchange today: greet, name, one question, goodbye — start to finish.
Say one full sentence combining хочу and но, out loud, to a real person.
mission.verification: Did the conversation hold together start to finish? Note yes / no.

srsCards.front: Hello! My name is ... Nice to meet you.
I want to speak Russian, but it's difficult.
srsCards.back: Я хочу говорить по-русски, но это трудно.

srsCards.front: What do you like to do?
I like reading and listening to music.
srsCards.back: Я люблю читать и слушать музыку.
